# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys directly to production when code is pushed to the main branch. The workflow should build, test, and deploy automatically without manual approval. This enables our continuous deployment workflow for rapid iteration.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI/CD pipeline 
on:
  push:
    branches:
      - master
jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - name: Checkout 🛎️
      uses: actions/checkout@v2.3.1
      
    - name: Build and Test with Gradle ⚙️ 
      run: |
        chmod +x gradlew
        ./gradlew build
        
    - name: Deploy 🚀
      uses: akhileshns/heroku-deploy@v3.10.8 
      with:
        heroku_api_key: ${{secrets.HEROKU_API_KEY}}
        heroku_app_name: ${{secrets.HEROKU_APP_NAME}}
        heroku_email: ${{secrets.HEROKU_EMAIL}}
